description_long: This is a high-top sneaker with a vibrant, multi-colored gradient design that transitions from orange at the heel to turquoise and purple towards the toe. The shoe features a classic rubber toe cap and sole in white, with a visible textured edge. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with eyelets running up the front, and the laces themselves are a mix of blue and purple. On the inner side, there is a circular Converse All Star logo patch in white, black, and blue. The shoe's upper appears to be made of canvas, while the sole and toe cap are rubber, and the interior is likely lined with fabric for comfort. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and visually striking, suitable for urban environments.
description: A vibrant, high-top sneaker with a gradient orange-to-turquoise canvas upper, white rubber toe cap and sole, and a classic Converse All Star logo patch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded white rubber toe cap, criss-cross lacing, and the colorful gradient upper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the smooth gradient from orange to turquoise, the white sole, and the absence of a logo patch.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the vertical orange stripe running down the heel and the color transition from orange to turquoise.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring the Converse All Star logo patch, the gradient upper, and the full length of the lacing system.
attribute_logo: Circular Converse All Star logo patch on the inner side, white background with black and blue text and star.
